name: Golf 365 RI
about: Golf 365 RI is a golf training facility and virtual golf simulator venue in Warwick, Rhode Island. It specializes in year-round golf practice and skill development using advanced golf simulator technology. The facility offers a range of services including individual and group coaching, player development programs, and various membership options. Golf 365 RI caters to golfers of all ages and abilities, from beginners to serious players looking to improve their game through technology-enhanced instruction and practice.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round access to advanced golf simulator technology
Comprehensive coaching programs for all skill levels
Flexible membership options for regular practice
Multiple leagues and events for different skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned on website
No alcohol service mentioned on website

simulator_hardware.notes: Website mentions advanced golf simulator technology but doesn't specify brands

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify, but typically golf simulator facilities provide rental clubs or recommend bringing your own for the most accurate experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answers: The website doesn't mention any food or drink service, but doesn't specify if outside food is allowed. BYOB policies are not mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't provide specific timing for 18 holes on the simulator, but typical virtual golf rounds take approximately 1-2 hours depending on the format and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Golf 365 RI offers a High School Golf Membership and mentions programs for golfers of all ages, including juniors. They specifically mention junior golfers in their membership benefits.
